sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT A.C_CLUBNO, C_NAME, CLOSESTATE, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN D.C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE D.C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_CLUBGUBUN, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME END AS USERNAME, A.C_SYSOPID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(APPLICATIONDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as APPLICATIONDATE FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.C_CLUBNO = D.C_CLUBNO AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY E ON D.C_CATE_A = E.C_CODE AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID WHERE E.C_CAT = 'a'
AND CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN D.C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE D.C_CLUBNAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND A.CLOSEREASON LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND E.C_CODE = #v_S_RADIO#
AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY APPLICATIONDATE DESC LIMIT #v_STARTROW#, 10

SELECT DISTINCT A.c_clubno, c_name, closestate, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN D.C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE D.C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME, c_clubConfirmType, c_clubGubun, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME END AS USERNAME, A.c_sysopid, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(applicationdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB D ON A.c_clubno = D.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY E ON D.c_cate_a = E.c_code AND D.tenant_id = E.tenant_id WHERE E.c_cat = 'a' AND D.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC LIMIT #v_STARTROW#, 10

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT C1.C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE as C1 INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON RTRIM(C1.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.CN) AND C1.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUB.C_CLUBNO = C1.C_CLUBNO AND TBL_C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = C1.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY D ON TBL_C_CLUB.C_CATE_A = D.C_CODE AND TBL_C_CLUB.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE D.C_CAT = 'a'
AND CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_C_CLUB.C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE TBL_C_CLUB.C_CLUBNAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND C1.CLOSEREASON LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND D.C_CODE = #v_S_RADIO#
AND TBL_C_CLUB.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C1.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT C1.c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE as C1 INNER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno = C1.c_clubno AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = C1.tenant_id WHERE TBL_C_CLUB.companyid = #companyID# AND C1.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT DISTINCT C_CLUBNO, C_NAME, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_CLUBGUBUN, IFNULL(CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN B.USERNAME2 ELSE B.USERNAME END) AS USERNAME, C_SYSOPID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C_REGDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as C_REGDATE FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY D ON A.C_CATE_A = D.C_CODE AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE D.C_CAT = 'a'
AND CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND C_CLUBDESC LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND D.C_CODE = #v_S_RADIO#
AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.C_REGDATE DESC LIMIT #v_STARTROW#, 10

SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_name, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME, c_clubConfirmType, c_clubGubun, IFNULL(CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN B.USERNAME2 ELSE B.USERNAME END) AS username, c_sysopid, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(c_regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = B.userid AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = C.CN AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY D ON A.c_cate_a = D.c_code AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE D.c_cat = 'a' AND A.companyID = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.c_regdate DESC LIMIT #v_STARTROW#, 10

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON TRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = TRIM(B.USERID) AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON TRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY D ON A.C_CATE_A = D.C_CODE AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE D.C_CAT = 'a'
AND CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND C_CLUBDESC LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%')
AND D.C_CODE = #v_S_RADIO#
AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'N' AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND companyid = #companyID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT C_CLUBNO, C_MEMBERCNT, C_NAME, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN C_CLUBNAME ELSE C_CLUBNAME2 END AS C_CLUBNAME, C_CLUBCONFIRMTYPE, C_CLUBGUBUN, C_SYSOPID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(c_regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) AS C_REGDATE, DEPTID FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID)) T ON A.C_SYSOPID = T.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = T.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY E ON A.C_CATE_A = E.C_CODE AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID WHERE E.C_CAT = 'a'
AND CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN C_CLUBNAME ELSE C_CLUBNAME2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND C_CLUBDESC LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND E.C_CODE = #v_STRSELECT#
AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY C_CLUBNO, C_SYSOPID ORDER BY C_REGDATE DESC LIMIT #v_STARTROW# ,10

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY B ON A.C_CATE_A = B.C_CODE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON RTRIM(A.C_SYSOPID) = RTRIM(C.CN) AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.C_CAT = 'a'
AND CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND C_CLUBDESC LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND B.C_CODE = #v_STRSELECT#
AND C_ADMINCONFIRM = 'Y' AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT c_sysopid, c_clubgubun, isin, c_clubdesc, c_clubconfirmtype, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME, c_cate_a, c_cate_b, c_cate_c FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_cate_a = #v_C_CATE_A#, c_cate_b = #v_C_CATE_B#, c_cate_c = #v_C_CATE_C#, C_CLUBNAME2 C_CLUBNAME = #v_C_CLUBNAME#, c_clubdesc = #v_C_CLUBDESC#, isin = 2 WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT closereason FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubdesc FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_COMCLOSE SET closestate = #v_PCLOSESTATE# WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'C' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'Y' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO USER (userid, usernm, passwd, empno, emptype, deptid, positionid, jobtitleid, status, email, mobiletel, officetel, fax, hometel, userintro, joindate, retiredate, totalmileage, recentmileage, seq, regdate, photopath, conlevel, subdeptid, roleinfo, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, #v_COMNAME#, '', '', 'W', 'TOP', 1, 1, 'W', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, #v_pNow#, #v_pNow#, 0, 0, NULL, #v_pNow#, NULL, '', NULL, 'C', #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO ROLE (userid, roletype, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, 'C', #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.email EMAIL, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN B.USERNAME2 ELSE B.USERNAME END AS USERNAME, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN A.C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE A.C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME, B.USERID USERID, A.C_CLUBNO C_CLUBNO FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN A.username ELSE A.username2 END) AS username FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.userid = B.CN WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_ID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(C_CLUBNO), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE CLOSESTATE = #v_PCLOSESTATE#
AND CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND CLOSEREASON LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT C_CLUBNO, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN C_CLUBNAME ELSE C_CLUBNAME2 END AS C_CLUBNAME, C_SYSOPID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(APPLICATIONDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL +#v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as APPLICATIONDATE, CLOSEREASON FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE CLOSESTATE = #v_PCLOSESTATE#
AND CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN C_CLUBNAME ELSE C_CLUBNAME2 END LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND CLOSEREASON LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%')
AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY APPLICATIONDATE DESC LIMIT #v_STARTROW#, 10

SELECT c_clubno, CASE #v_USERINFO_LANG# WHEN '2' THEN C_CLUBNAME2 ELSE C_CLUBNAME END AS C_CLUBNAME, c_sysopid, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(applicationdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL + #v_OFFSETMIN# minute) as applicationdate, closereason FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE c_clubno = #v_CODE# AND companyid = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_COMCLOSE SET closestate = #v_PCLOSESTATE#, closereason = #v_REASON# WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
